case_title: JERRI E. KINSLOW VS. ANTHONY IMBRESCI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-02-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-02-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM BRUCE LUBARSKY. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF JERRI E. KINSLOW (VIA PHONE) AND DEFENDANT ANTHONY IMBRESCI. DEFENDANT SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRUCE LUBARSKY. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-02-2016 - JUDGMENT.
